_publications._publicationTitle: In vivo synaptic transmission and morphology in mouse models of Tuberous sclerosis, Fragile X syndrome, Neurofibromatosis type 1, and Costello syndrome.

_contextSnippet: Changes in morphology in the mouse models for TSC and FXS were not reflected in obvious changes in baseline synaptic transmission or short-term plasticity.
details: Changes in morphology were not reflected in obvious changes in baseline synaptic transmission or short-term plasticity at the calyx of Held synapse
